class.name: PreparedStatement
class.brief_description: Represents a prepared statement for use with a [Database].

method.name: bind_blob
method.description: Bind a blob to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_double
method.description: Bind a double to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_float
method.description: Bind a float to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_int
method.description: Bind an int to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_int64
method.description: Bind a 64bit int to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_null
method.description: Bind null to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: get_bind_parameter_count
method.description: The bindable parameter count in a query.

method.name: get_bind_parameter_index
method.description: Some database backends support naming bind parameters using a special syntax. Use this method to get back the index of a named parameter. Indexed from 0, -1 means not found.

method.name: get_bind_parameter_name
method.description: Some database backends support naming bind parameters using a special syntax. Use this method to get back the name of a parameter from it's index.

method.name: bind_text
method.description: Bind a [String] to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_value
method.description: Bind a [Variant] to the index-th parameter. This mwthod will call other bind methods based on the value's type. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: bind_zeroblob
method.description: Bind an empty blob with the size of num to the index-th parameter. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: clear_bindings
method.description: Clear all bound parameters, effectively setting their values back to null.

method.name: column_blob_get
method.description: Read a blob from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: get_column_count
method.description: Return the number of columns in the result set. Just because this returns a number greater than 0, it does not mean there is going to be rows returned.

method.name: column_database_name_get
method.description: Returns the database's name from which the column is from if the database backend supports it.

method.name: column_decltype_get
method.description: Returns the declared type of the given column.

method.name: column_double_get
method.description: Read a double from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_float_get
method.description: Read a float from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_int_get
method.description: Read an int from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_int64_get
method.description: Read an int64 from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_name_get
method.description: Read the index-th's column's name. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_origin_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's origin name if the database backend supports it. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_table_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's table name if the database backend supports it. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_text_get
method.description: Read a text from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_type_get
method.description: Returns the column's type. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: column_value_get
method.description: Read a [Variant] from the index-th column. (Indexed from 0)

method.name: current_column_database_name_get
method.description: Returns the database's name from which the column is from if the database backend supports it.

method.name: current_column_decltype_get
method.description: Returns the declared type of the given column.

method.name: current_column_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's name if the database backend supports it.

method.name: current_column_origin_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's origin name if the database backend supports it.

method.name: current_column_table_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's table name if the database backend supports it.

method.name: current_column_type_get
method.description: Returns the column's type.

method.name: get_data_count
method.description: Returns the number of columns in the current row. Returns 0 if there is no more rows available, or no more data is available.

method.name: finalize
method.description: Free the query from the database system. The destructor calls this automatically.

method.name: get_connection
method.description: Returns the owner connection.

method.name: get_expanded_sql
method.description: Returns the expanded version of the original sql, if the database backend supports it.

method.name: get_last_insert_rowid
method.description: Returns the last inserted row's id. Some backend might need additional statements in the given sql for this to work.

method.name: get_normalized_sql
method.description: Returns the normalized version of the original sql, if the database backend supports it.

method.name: has_data
method.description: Returns whether there is still data to be read.

method.name: set_next_bind_blob
method.description: Bind a blob to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_double
method.description: Bind a double to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_float
method.description: Bind a float to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_int
method.description: Bind an int to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_int64
method.description: Bind an int64 to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_null
method.description: Bind a null to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_text
method.description: Bind text to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_value
method.description: Bind a value to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: set_next_bind_zeroblob
method.description: Bind a zeroblob to the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column
method.description: Go to the next column.

method.name: next_column_blob_get
method.description: Read a blob from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_database_name_get
method.description: Returns the database's name from which the column is from if the database backend supports it, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_decltype_get
method.description: Returns the declared type of the given column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_double_get
method.description: Read a double from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_float_get
method.description: Read a float from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_int_get
method.description: Read an int from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_int64_get
method.description: Read an int64 from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's name if the database backend supports it, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_origin_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's origin name if the database backend supports it, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_table_name_get
method.description: Returns the column's table name if the database backend supports it, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_text_get
method.description: Read a text from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_type_get
method.description: Returns the column's type, then go to the next.

method.name: next_column_value_get
method.description: Read a value from the current column, then go to the next.

method.name: prepare
method.description: Compiles the sql query in [member sql]. You need to call this before trying to use your query. Subsequent calls update the stored query on the database server.

method.name: reset
method.description: Reset the query. Call this before trying to use it again with different parameters.

method.name: step
method.description: Step the query. When calling this the first time it runs the query getting the first row (if available). Subsequent calls read next rows. Returns OK on success, ERR_FILE_EOF when done, and FAILED when there was an error.

members.member: The index of the current column. Used by next_* and current_* getters and setters. [method step] resets it to 0.
The sql statement to send to the database.
